# veeam_repositories (Data Source)

Data source for fetching repositories from Veeam. Can fetch all repositories or a specific repository by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `repository_id` (String) ID of a specific repository to fetch
- `repository_name` (String) Name of a specific repository to fetch

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier
- `repositories` (Attributes List) List of repositories (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories))

<a id="nestedatt--repositories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories`

Read-Only:

- `capacity` (Number) Total capacity of the repository in bytes
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp
- `description` (String) Description of the repository
- `free_space` (Number) Free space in the repository in bytes
- `id` (String) Repository identifier
- `name` (String) Name of the repository
- `path` (String) Path of the repository
- `status` (String) Status of the repository
- `type` (String) Type of the repository
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp
- `used_space` (Number) Used space in the repository in bytes
